## beehiiv webhooks update

Update a webhook by endpoint ID

### Synopsis

Update webhook

Update a webhook subscription for a publication.

API path: /publications/{publicationId}/webhooks/{endpointId}

```
beehiiv webhooks update <endpointId> [flags]
```

### Examples

```
beehiiv webhooks update endpoint_123 --body @webhook.json
beehiiv hooks edit endpoint_123 --body @webhook.json
```

### Options

```
      --body string         Provide a request body as inline JSON, @path, or - for stdin
  -h, --help                help for update
      --query stringArray   Add a repeatable query parameter in key=value form
```

      --rate-limit-rpm int      Override the internal rate limit
